property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Empower 3. Attach this card to your World Games Saga Black Style Mastery. While attached, as long as you control at least as many non-combats as your opponent, your attacks deal +3 life cards of damage and gain "If Successful, gain 3 power stages." You may only have 1 Black Power Rush attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Costs 0 power stages to perform. For the remainder of combat, when you discard a card from your opponent's hand or remove any number of cards in their discard pile from the game, you do not pay costs for the next attack you perform this combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack. Raise your anger 1. You may remove any number of cards in your discard pile with "Kick" in the title from the game. For every 2 cards removed this way, this attack foes +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, you may play any non-combat cards that were discarded from your opponent's life deck as damage from this attack. Non-combat cards played this way are considered to be Black style cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, search your discard pile for a card with "Kick" in the title and place it into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused Energy Attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform. Raise your anger 1 level. For the remainder of combat, when you gain anger from a Blue Style card, prevent X power stages and X life cards of damage from the next attack performed against you, where X = Twice the amount of anger you gained.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck Only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Discard one of your opponent's Non-Combats or Allies in play. Lower your opponent's anger 1. If your opponent's current anger level is 0 remove an additional Non-Combat or Ally in play form the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may have multiple copies of this drill in play. Whenever an effect is used that can raise or lower your opponents anger, they discard the top 2 cards of their life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Empower 2. Attach this card to your Trunks Saga Blue Style Mastery. While attached, your attacks deal +X power stages of damage, where X = your opponent's anger level. When you play a Blue style card that can lower your opponent's anger, you may raise their anger 1 level instead. You may only have 1 copy of Blue Power Throw attached to your mastery at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use during your Non-Combat step. You may place up to 3 Blue style cards that perform attacks from your hand into play. These cards are treated as Blue style Non-Combat cards with "Sword" in the title until they leave play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Empower 2. You cannot win by MPPV for the remainder of the game. Attach this card to your Cell Saga Nameian Style Mastery. While attached, your physical attacks gain "If successful, raise your anger 1 level."

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage Only. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may discard an Ally in play to advance a personality level. You cannot win by MPPV for the remainder of the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage. If your Main Personality's highest power rating is below 500,000, for the remainder of combat while your Main Personality is not at 0, the base damage of your physical attacks is 6 when you use the PAT.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2. You may shuffle a Dragonball you control back into its owner's life deck to search your life deck for a card with "8" in the power box other than "Namekian Dragon Punch" and put it into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your life deck. Empower 2. You may attach this card to your Main Personality. While attached, cards you play with "8" in their Power Box gain "Raise your anger 1." You may only have 1 Namekian Rage attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack or raise your MP to its highest power stage. Attach this card to your Trunks Saga Orange Style Mastery. While attached, your Orange style energy attacks deal +1 life card of damage, and after taking damage from a physical attack the first time each combat, raise your MP to its higheste power stage. You may only have 1 Orange Rising Energy attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Stops a physical attack. Raise your anger 1. For the remainder of combat, your Orange style attacks cost -2 power stages to perform to a minimum of 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat when you perform an Orange style attack, it is considered to be an Energy attack for opponent's card effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Focused Energy Attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, attach this to your main personality. While attached, if your opponent would deal power stages of damage with an attack, you may instead take the damage as life cards. If stopped, remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, for the remainder of combat your Orange attacks with endurance do +X power stages of damage, where X= their printed Endurance.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack, costs 1 power stage to perform. Empower 3. Attach this card to your World Games Saga Red Style Mastery. While attched your Red Style energy attacks gain "If stopped, gain 3 power stages and discard the top card of your opponent's life deck. If successful, you may raise your anger 1." You can only have 1 Red Energy Misdirection attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1. Empower 2. Attach this card to your Buu Saga Red Style Mastery. While attached, your Focused attacks deal +2 power stages of damage, and your Red style attacks gain "If successful, and this attack is not removed from the game after use, shuffle into your life deck after use." You may only have 1 Red Stretching attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack. Empower 2. If successful, raise your anger 2. If stopped, your opponent cannot use Non-Combat or Combat cards in their next Attacker Attacks phase.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Raise your anger 1. In your next "Attacker Attacks" phase, perform the exact same attack that this card stopped, if you have the power stages to pay for the attack. You opponent skips their next "Attacker Attacks" phase this combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: (When entering combat, if this card is in your discard pile, you may remove it from the game to gain 5 power stages.) At the end of each combat. Shuffle up to the top X cards from your discard pile into your life deck, where X = your anger level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack stays on the table to be used 2 more times this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering combat, attach this card to your World Games Saga Saiyan Style Mastery. While attached, when you reveal a Saiyan style card to with your Mastery, prevent all damage from the first unstopped attack performed against you that combat. Each time you prevent damage from an attack, the next Saiyan style attack you perform that combat deals that much additional damage. You may only have 1 Saiyan Riposte attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Prevent 2 power stages of damage from your opponents physical attacks, and 2 life cards of damage from their energy attacks. When entering combat choose an ally you have in play. The chosen ally may take control of combat regardless of your MP's stages above 0 for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Focused energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-waza, raise your anger 1 and prevent 2 power stages of damage from your opponent's attacks for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage Only. Energy attack Raise your anger 1. Empower 3. This card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this combat. When this card is used a second time, it reads "prevent all damage from an opponents attack. Raise your anger 1." Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (You cannot name or affect a Main Personality, Dragon Ball, Sensei, or Mastery with this card.) Heroes Only. Energy attack. You may shuffle a card in play into its owner's life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: You allies in play with "Android" in their titles cannot be discarded or removed from play. If you put this card into your hand during combat with a card effect, you may place it into play instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Empower 4. If your opponent has 3 or more Non-Combat cards in play, your opponent's Freestyle Non-combat cards cannot be used for the remainder of combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card's name is also considered "The Car" for card effects. While attached this card is considered to be a Location for card effects instead of a Non-Combat.) Attach to your Android 16, 17, or 18. While attached when entering combat, draw a card. You may only have 1 copy of "The Van" in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared a Tokui-Waza, your non-Drill cards with "Sword" in the title are considered Styled cards that match your Tokui-waza.

property.name: Text
property.value: When a personality is at a power rating above 0, it is considered to have a power rating of Z.

property.name: Text
property.value: Players cannot have more than 4 cards in their hand. When a player would search their life deck, they search the top 6 cards instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (Piccolo is considered to be in play for card effects.) Power: Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. For the remainder of combat, physical attacks performed by Nail that do not use the Physical Attack table do +3 power stages and +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, you may search your Life Deck for a Physical Combat or Energy Combat card with "Technique" or "Move" in the title and put it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, you may draw a card. If that card is a Tien named card, you may discard it to draw a card. Your Tien named cards that are removed from the game after use are discarded instead. You may pay costs of your Tien named cards in life cards instead of power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this is part of your MP stack, your opponent's personalities are considered to be Villains and Majins for your card effects for the remainder of the game.) Constant Combat Power: Your attacks deal +1 life card of damage for each Villain personality in play. If a personality has Majin in its printed title, your attacks deal +2 life cards of damage for each Villain personality in play instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Future Gohan is your MP, this card leave play, take control of combat, or have damage redirected to it and does not have to be in control of combat to use this power.) Constant Combat Power: Your Saiyan style drills are not discarded when you advance a personality level. You may have 2 Saiyan Style drills in play that are the same name. Your Saiyan style attacks gain "You may raise your anger 1."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is part of your MP Stack, your cards with "Kamehameha" in the title are considered non-styled for Tokui-Waza requirements for the remainder of the game) Constant Combat Power: Your cards with "Kamehameha" in the title are also considered Goten named cards for card effects. You may pay life cards instead of power stages when paying costs to perform energy attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, your Drills with "Sword" or "Swordplay" in the title are not discarded when you advance a personality level.) Contant Combat Power: Whenever you play a card with "Sword" or "Swordplay" in the title, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: You attacks with "Sword" in the title gain "Raise your anger 1 level." Once per combat, when performing an attack you may discard a card with "Sword" in the title to force your opponent to use 2 cards/effects to stop the attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Cards in your discard pile with "Sword" in the title gain Transform and "If successful, you may raise your anger 1 level."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Physical attack doing +1 life card of damage for each card with "Sword" or "Swordplay" in the title in play, and in your discard and removed from the game piles.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When you use a card's printed Endurance, or when you use a Styled card with printed Endurance, place it under your mastery after use. Once per combat, you may place a card from your hand under your mastery to play a card from under your mastery that can perform an attack. It gains "Remove from the game after use".

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, place the top card of your discard pile under your mastery. Twice per combat you may place a card from your hand under your mastery to play a card from under your mastery that can perform an attack. It gains "Remove from the game after use".

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: At the beginning of each turn you may choose 1 of your lower personality powers, Janemba has the chosen power for the remainder of the turn. Power: Focused Physical Attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may choose a card from under your mastery and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your allies gain +1 power stage during the power-up step. If Nail or Dende are in play, you may play allies 1 level higher than your main personality's level. You may use this power regardless of your MP's power rating.
